ideation: This sequence depicts a man getting a haircut. The left arm rests on the armrest, while the right arm is positioned for the haircut.  The sequence will show a slight head tilt and a relaxed posture. Frame 1 shows the initial pose, frame 2 shows a slight adjustment to the head, and frame 3 shows the final pose. Frame 4 shows a slight relaxation of the pose.

frames.beat: left arm rests, right arm held ready for the cut
a slight adjustment as the haircut begins
the right arm holds steady, the cut continues
both arms relax slightly, the haircut nears completion
